detail_text: About this item [Brand Overview] Thermalright is a Taiwan brand with more than 20 years of development. It has a certain popularity in the domestic and foreign markets and has a pivotal influence in the player market. We have been focusing on the research and development of computer accessories. R & D product lines include: CPU air-cooled radiator, case fan, CPU fan controller, anti falling off mounting bracket, support mounting bracket and other commodities. 【High Performance Cooling Fan】 Automatic speed control of the motherboard through the 4PIN PWM fan cable interface, which can determine the speed according to the temperature of the motherboard. The cpu fan is equipped with a 4-pin power connector and a cable with a serial ARGB lighting connector, which plugs directly into the motherboard. 【Quality Bearings】The carefully developed quality S-FDB bearings solve the problem of pc cooling fan blade shaking in lifting mode, keeping fan noise to a minimum while providing maximum cooling performance when needed and extending the life of the PC pwm fan. 【Unique ARGB Mirror Lighting Effect】The well-designed ARGB infinite frame structure is distributed on the side of the fan, and the ARGB lines are distributed around the front of the case fan, together with the infinite frame ARGB aperture, it can achieve the combination of positive & measured surface ARGB lighting effect, and multiple phantom colourful lighting effects can be achieved under the action of the airflow. 【High Performance Cooling Fan】Automatic speed control of the motherboard through the 4PIN PWM fan cable interface, which can determine the speed according to the temperature of the motherboard. The cpu fan is equipped with a 4-pin power connector and a cable with a serial ARGB lighting connector, which plugs directly into the motherboard. 【Detail Optimization】The case fan is made of industrial-grade PBT+PC material, with a cable up to 55CM long, and supports PWM/ARGB series control of the computer fan. (Note: No more than 5 ARGB fans of the same specification cannot be connected in series). 【Perfect Match】The cpu fan can be used not only as a case fan, but also suitable for use with a cpu cooler to create a cooling effect together, which can take away the dry heat from the case and the high temperature generated by the CPU in operation, allowing for maximum cooling; Ideal for cases, cpu water cooler and CPU air coolers.
detail_html:
About this item

[Brand Overview] Thermalright is a Taiwan brand with more than 20 years of development. It has a certain popularity in the domestic and foreign markets and has a pivotal influence in the player market. We have been focusing on the research and development of computer accessories. R & D product lines include: CPU air-cooled radiator, case fan, CPU fan controller, anti falling off mounting bracket, support mounting bracket and other commodities.

【High Performance Cooling Fan】 Automatic speed control of the motherboard through the 4PIN PWM fan cable interface, which can determine the speed according to the temperature of the motherboard. The cpu fan is equipped with a 4-pin power connector and a cable with a serial ARGB lighting connector, which plugs directly into the motherboard.

【Quality Bearings】The carefully developed quality S-FDB bearings solve the problem of pc cooling fan blade shaking in lifting mode, keeping fan noise to a minimum while providing maximum cooling performance when needed and extending the life of the PC pwm fan.

【Unique ARGB Mirror Lighting Effect】The well-designed ARGB infinite frame structure is distributed on the side of the fan, and the ARGB lines are distributed around the front of the case fan, together with the infinite frame ARGB aperture, it can achieve the combination of positive & measured surface ARGB lighting effect, and multiple phantom colourful lighting effects can be achieved under the action of the airflow.

【High Performance Cooling Fan】Automatic speed control of the motherboard through the 4PIN PWM fan cable interface, which can determine the speed according to the temperature of the motherboard. The cpu fan is equipped with a 4-pin power connector and a cable with a serial ARGB lighting connector, which plugs directly into the motherboard.

【Detail Optimization】The case fan is made of industrial-grade PBT+PC material, with a cable up to 55CM long, and supports PWM/ARGB series control of the computer fan. (Note: No more than 5 ARGB fans of the same specification cannot be connected in series).

【Perfect Match】The cpu fan can be used not only as a case fan, but also suitable for use with a cpu cooler to create a cooling effect together, which can take away the dry heat from the case and the high temperature generated by the CPU in operation, allowing for maximum cooling; Ideal for cases, cpu water cooler and CPU air coolers.

title: Raspberry Pi 5 Active Cooler SC1148 Heatsink Cooling Fan Metal Heat Sink Thermal Pad Variable Speed Control 5V DC RPI PI5
detail_text: The Raspberry Pi Active Cooler provides an alternative cooling solution for users who wish to use their Raspberry Pi 5 under sustained heavy load without a case. The Active Cooler combines a large metal heatsink with a high-quality variable-speed blower fan , powered and controlled via the fan connector on the Raspberry Pi 5, attached to the board via sprung pins into the dedicated pair of mounting holes. As the heat from the Pi 5 CPU spreads across the heatsink body and fins, the blower fan pushes cool air over them to keep your Raspberry Pi 5 running at optimal thermal levels. The cooler uses thermal pads to create a solid thermal connection with the Raspberry Pi 5. The fan is software-controlled, allowing it to remain off (and therefore silent) until temperatures reach the specified threshold. Features Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5 Large metal 'finned' heatsink combined with a high-quality blower fan Fan fitting compatible with the Raspberry Pi 5 fan connector Variable speed fan (software/temperature controlled) Uses the Raspberry Pi 5 heatsink mount holes Thermal pads included (pre-fitted) Specification Input voltage: 5V DC supplied via four-pin fan header on Raspberry Pi 5 Fan speed control: Pulse width modulation control with tachometer Maximum airflow: 1.09 CFM Maximum fan speed: 8000 RPM +/- 15% Product material: Anodised aluminium Manufacturer SKU: SC1148 Important notes It is recommend that the Active Cooler is not removed once it is fitted to Raspberry Pi 5. Removal of the Active Cooler will cause the push pins and thermal pads to degrade and is likely to lead to product damage. Discontinue use of the Active Cooler if the push pins are damaged or deformed, or if they do not clip securely. Resources Raspberry Pi Active Cooler product brief: https://datasheets.raspberrypi.com/cooling/raspberry-pi-active-cooler-product-brief.pdf Raspberry Pi Active Cooler mechanical drawing: https://datasheets.raspberrypi.com/cooling/raspberry-pi-active-cooler-mechanical-drawing.pdf Compliance For a full list of local and regional product approvals, please visit pip.raspberrypi.com Obsolescence Statement Raspberry Pi Active Cooler will remain in production until at least January 2035
detail_html:
The Raspberry Pi Active Cooler provides an alternative cooling solution for users who wish to use their Raspberry Pi 5 under sustained heavy load without a case.

The Active Cooler combines a large metal heatsink with a high-quality variable-speed blower fan, powered and controlled via the fan connector on the Raspberry Pi 5, attached to the board via sprung pins into the dedicated pair of mounting holes.

As the heat from the Pi 5 CPU spreads across the heatsink body and fins, the blower fan pushes cool air over them to keep your Raspberry Pi 5 running at optimal thermal levels. The cooler uses thermal pads to create a solid thermal connection with the Raspberry Pi 5.

The fan is software-controlled, allowing it to remain off (and therefore silent) until temperatures reach the specified threshold.

 

Features

  • Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5
  • Large metal 'finned' heatsink combined with a high-quality blower fan
  • Fan fitting compatible with the Raspberry Pi 5 fan connector
  • Variable speed fan (software/temperature controlled)
  • Uses the Raspberry Pi 5 heatsink mount holes
  • Thermal pads included (pre-fitted)

 

Specification

  • Input voltage: 5V DC supplied via four-pin fan header on Raspberry Pi 5
  • Fan speed control: Pulse width modulation control with tachometer
  • Maximum airflow: 1.09 CFM
  • Maximum fan speed: 8000 RPM +/- 15%
  • Product material: Anodised aluminium
  • Manufacturer SKU: SC1148

 

Important notes

It is recommend that the Active Cooler is not removed once it is fitted to Raspberry Pi 5. Removal of the Active Cooler will cause the push pins and thermal pads to degrade and is likely to lead to product damage. Discontinue use of the Active Cooler if the push pins are damaged or deformed, or if they do not clip securely.

 

Resources

  • Raspberry Pi Active Cooler product brief: https://datasheets.raspberrypi.com/cooling/raspberry-pi-active-cooler-product-brief.pdf
  • Raspberry Pi Active Cooler mechanical drawing: https://datasheets.raspberrypi.com/cooling/raspberry-pi-active-cooler-mechanical-drawing.pdf

 

Compliance

For a full list of local and regional product approvals, please visit pip.raspberrypi.com

 

Obsolescence Statement

Raspberry Pi Active Cooler will remain in production until at least January 2035

detail_text: Dual Fan Mobile Phone Cooler Plug-in/Rechargeable Portable Game Heat Sink Air Cooling Type-C with Blue Light for Android IOS PUBG Game Cooler Feature: 1. Dual Fan Cooling Technology: The mobile phone cooler is equipped with dual cooling fans featuring quiet turbine technology capable of generating strong airflow while maintaining low noise levels. High-speed operation and wide-area coverage ensure your device stays cool, complemented by esports blue light for an immersive gaming atmosphere. 2. Extended Play with Dual Battery Compartments: Our mobile phone radiator includes dual battery compartments with built-in 2x300mAh rechargeable batteries, offering 2-4 hours of battery life. (Note: The wired model does not include batteries) 3. High-Speed Operation with Low Noise: Featuring a brushless motor, the portable game heat sink ensures stable airflow without vibration. Hydraulic bearing fans spin at high speeds while remaining quiet, and the noise-reduction air duct design ensures silent operation even under full load, allowing you to fully immerse in every gaming moment without disturbance. 4. Adjustable Speed Settings: The phone cooler supports two adjustable speed settings to cater to different gaming needs. Choose between "Gale Mode" for immediate cooling or "Storm Mode" for maximum airflow. (Note: Speed adjustment is not available on the wired model) 5. Universal Compatibility with Type-C Interface: Designed with a strong compatibility Type-C interface, the cell phone cooling fan can be used with both charging and power modes, compatible with the same charging equipment as your phone. The 69-86mm extendable elastic back clip and anti-slip silicone pads ensure a secure fit for iPhone/ for Android phones ranging from 62~92mm in width, without causing damage to the device. title: JEYI M.2 SSD Heatsink With silent fan 2280 NVME NGFF Radiator Magnesium Aluminum Alloy PC Efficient Cooler with Thermal Silicone Pad
detail_text: The JEYI heatsink features a 3-pin silent turbo fan（also can be connected to 4pin port), providing efficient cooling while creating a quiet and comfortable working environment. Broad Compatibility: Perfectly suitable for M.2 2280 SSD, compatible with a variety of motherboards, especially ideal for high-heat SAMSUNG PCIE 4.0 980Pro and EVO 970Pro. Enhanced Cooling Efficiency: Featuring a multi-fin design, this heatsink provides a larger heat dissipation area, achieving multi-layered heat dissipation for ultimate cooling.
